TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_M‚Äôutu, title = M‚Äôutu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/M‚Äôutu} }

S.FORM: m'utu Itiniay i Guanxi Cen no Hsinchu ko m'utu a niyaro', 124 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 339 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 60% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 204 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 40% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 135 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal59%, Amis0.3%, Paiwan0.3%, roma0.3%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: m °o~u~uto~u~u itiniaj i *o~u~uanxi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u m °o~u~uto~u~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*.*%, paiwan*.*%, ro~uma*.*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: m'utu Itiniay i Guanxi Cen no Hsinchu ko m'utu a niyaro', 124 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 339 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 60% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 204 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 40% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 135 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal59%, Amis0.3%, Paiwan0.3%, roma0.3%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: m °o~u~uto~u~u itiniaj i *o~u~uanxi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u m °o~u~uto~u~u a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*.*%, paiwan*.*%, ro~uma*.*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~u °.
